Assigns a new id and appends a PENDING application.

DeepSeekClient - bupt.ta.llm中的类
DeepSeek Chat API (OpenAI-compatible: POST /v1/chat/completions).
DeepSeekClient() - 类 的构造器bupt.ta.llm.DeepSeekClient
Environment-driven construction.
DeepSeekClient(String, String, String) - 类 的构造器bupt.ta.llm.DeepSeekClient
Explicit configuration; the client is treated as enabled regardless of environment.
DeepSeekClient(boolean, String, String, String) - 类 的构造器bupt.ta.llm.DeepSeekClient
Full constructor allowing an explicit enabled flag, used by DeepSeekClient.fromAdminSettings(AiApiSettings) so the admin toggle bypasses env-var checks.

Resolved SMTP and portal settings used to send mail.

Outcome of a single send attempt.

enforceWorkloadLimitForApplicant(DataStorage, String, String, AdminSettings) - 类 中的方法bupt.ta.service.AdminService
Auto-closes excess SELECTED applications for one TA down to the configured cap.

Applies workload-cap enforcement for every TA; returns total auto-closed count.

Job - bupt.ta.model中的类
Job posting - created by Module Organiser.

JobActivity - bupt.ta.util中的类
Whether a job is still "active" for MO day-to-day management (My Jobs).

TA job search with optional filters and rule-based skill match scores.

JobSelectionCapacity - bupt.ta.util中的类
Shared helpers for enforcing selected-TA capacity on a posting.
JobTemplate - bupt.ta.model中的类
Reusable MO job template so common course fields do not need retyping.
JobTemplate() - 类 的构造器bupt.ta.model.JobTemplate
 
JobWorkloadEstimator - bupt.ta.util中的类
Estimates expected hours per selected TA for a job from structured work arrangements (same basis as MO work-quota planning).

KIND_APPLICATION_SUBMITTED - 类 中的静态变量bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService

Application auto-closed due to workload cap.
KIND_AUTO_PROMOTED - 类 中的静态变量bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Promoted from waitlist to selected.
KIND_INTERVIEW_DETAILS - 类 中的静态变量bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService

KIND_STATUS_INTERVIEW - 类 中的静态变量bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Applicant moved to interview stage.
KIND_STATUS_REJECTED - 类 中的静态变量bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Applicant not selected.
KIND_STATUS_SELECTED - 类 中的静态变量bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Applicant selected for the role.
KIND_STATUS_WAITLIST - 类 中的静态变量bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Applicant placed on waitlist.
KIND_WITHDRAWN - 类 中的静态变量bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService

notifyApplicationSubmitted(DataStorage, Application, Job) - 类 中的静态方法bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Notifies the applicant that an application was submitted.
notifyAutoClosed(DataStorage, Application, Job, String) - 类 中的静态方法bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService

notifyAutoPromotedFromWaitlist(DataStorage, Application, Job) - 类 中的静态方法bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Notifies the applicant that they were promoted from the waitlist to selected.
notifyInterviewDetails(DataStorage, Application, Job) - 类 中的静态方法bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Notifies the applicant of interview time, location, and assessment notes.
notifyInterviewInvite(DataStorage, Application, Job) - 类 中的静态方法bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Notifies the applicant that their application moved to the interview stage.
notifyRejected(DataStorage, Application, Job, String) - 类 中的静态方法bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Notifies the applicant that they were not selected.
notifySelected(DataStorage, Application, Job) - 类 中的静态方法bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Notifies the applicant that they were selected for the role.
notifyWaitlist(DataStorage, Application, Job) - 类 中的静态方法bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Notifies the applicant that they are on the waitlist.
notifyWithdrawn(DataStorage, Application, Job) - 类 中的静态方法bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
Notifies the applicant that they withdrew an application.

TYPE_WITHDRAWN - 类 中的静态变量bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService
